reviews.review_description: It's a great game, though, people seem to think it's a Gorilla Tag copy. It clearly isn't, but overall, the game is great when people are online. I'd say there are no flaws, besides the fact that the game is still very new and not many people have seen it yet, so players are rarely online. Other than that, it's a great game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for clarifying its not a copy!

reviews.review_description: I have a friend who told me to play this because his friend made this. Though I could not at the time, my friend showed me on his phone. (connected to his oculus) For a gorilla tag fangame this is not all bad. As a person who’s making a gorilla tag fangame currently, this is pretty good. Needless to say this game has its setbacks, but overall a good game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review! You can make a suggestion in the discord if you want to get rid of those setbacks.
